name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders
features: Weekly email reports of reconciled invoices

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders
